product.name: AI Enterprise
product.northStar: The Ratings Agency — reads like a credit-rating desk for enterprise AI, not a SaaS product marketing itself. Deep institutional navy carries the page's weight; a single disciplined gold accent stands in for a seal of authority: verified, source-backed, stand behind it.
product.overview: AI Enterprise ranks enterprise-AI vendors on evidence, not opinion — every score traces to a real, cited source. The visual system is the graphic expression of the product's own hero line: 'Independent · Evidence-Based · Source-Cited.' Editorial serif is reserved for headlines and hero numerals only; every interactive and data surface stays in a quiet sans so nothing competes with the serif's authority. Dark is the resting state — the product is designed to be read like a terminal, and light mode is the accommodation.

colors.note: Ramps are systematically generated (HSL step scale) around the product's REAL committed brand anchors, pulled verbatim from app/globals.css and live components. Anchored steps are the actual shipped hex values; the remaining steps are interpolated to complete a usable 50-950 scale and are not independently 'brand' colors in their own right.

cream.caveat: Panel-cream (100) is lighter than page-cream (50) by design — an intentional inversion where floating panels sit a shade brighter than the page they float above, not a scale error.

mutedNavy.usage: Secondary/caption text. Same navy hue family as the ink ramp, desaturated (~21-24% sat) rather than a separate hue — muted text is 'quiet navy,' not gray.

semantic.note: Deliberately NOT the gold brand accent — live/seed status uses standard Tailwind emerald/rose so it reads as universal 'good/caution' rather than brand decoration.

display.name: Cormorant Garamond
display.role: Page mastheads and hero numerals only.

wordmark.name: Plus Jakarta Sans
wordmark.role: Homepage hero wordmark — heavy humanist display sans.

body.name: Geist Sans
body.role: All UI, navigation, body copy, labels.

mono.name: Geist Mono
mono.role: Tabular data — scores, dates, index values.

frequencyObserved.note: Real usage counts from a codebase grep — evidence for which sizes actually dominate the shipped product, not a target.

elevation.rule: Real shadow (floating/floatingLarge) is reserved for position:fixed or position:sticky chrome — the Ask AI launcher, its panel, toasts, dropdown menus. Cards and rows at rest use no shadow; depth comes from a translucent tint + hairline border instead.

radius.rule: 12px (rounded-xl) is the ceiling for cards and containers. Nothing in the shipped product exceeds 16px on a non-pill element.

easings.note: ease-out-quint — used on the Ask AI launcher's expand/collapse width transition. No bounce, no elastic anywhere in the product.

patterns.name: hover-brighten
patterns.trigger: hover on gold CTA — brightens rather than darkens

motion.reducedMotion: All transition-* utilities are paired with motion-reduce:transition-none on interactive chrome (verified on the Ask AI launcher).

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: The single highest-priority action per view. Solid gold fill, navy text, fully rounded. Brightens (never darkens) on hover.

components.name: Secondary / Ghost Button
components.description: Any action that isn't the page's single primary CTA. Transparent fill, hairline border.

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: The canonical CARD constant, copy-pasted verbatim across 16+ files. Flat at rest — translucent tint over the page + hairline border, no shadow.
components.html:
Frontier Model API

Composite score

Weighted across 13 evidence domains, coverage-discounted, evidence-gated at E2+.

components.name: Status Pill — Live Source
components.description: The product's most distinctive component. Calm emerald (never brand gold) marks data as source-backed. Deliberately unalarming — the absence of red anywhere on screen is itself the trust signal.

components.name: Status Pill — Seed Estimate
components.description: Restrained rose, not alarm red — marks data not yet promoted to analyst-verified. Same shape as the live pill so the two read as one system, not a warning overlay.

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: Solid deep-navy bar. Wordmark in Plus Jakarta Sans 800, links in Geist Sans, trailing gold CTA pill.
components.html:
AI Enterprise
RankingsModelsNews

components.name: Ask AI Launcher (signature component)
components.description: Fixed bottom-right. Icon-only (44x44) at rest so it never meaningfully overlaps content beneath it; expands to a labelled pill only on hover/focus/open. The one place real drop-shadow is used, because it's the one element genuinely floating above the page.

components.name: Editorial Hero Statement
components.description: The one serif moment per page. Cormorant Garamond, reserved for the single sentence meant to be read rather than scanned.
components.html:
Independent · Evidence-Based · Source-Cited

Who the enterprise-AI market runs on — and who's coming for them.

do: Reserve gold for CTAs, live-status, citations, and the brand mark only.
Use Cormorant Garamond sparingly — one serif statement per page.
Keep cards flat; save real shadow for fixed/sticky chrome only.
Pair data claims with a visible source citation and a status pill.
Design dark-mode-first; verify light mode as the secondary pass.
dont: No gradient text, glassmorphism, or hero-metric-with-gradient-accent templates.
No eyebrow kicker above every section — one is a brand device, on every panel it's scaffolding.
No third navy value — consolidate toward #13294b, not the drifted #15263c.
Muted text opacity must clear 4.5:1 in light mode (corrected to /65 from /60 on 2026-07-06/07).
